zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Beke於大約1345年出生在英國林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比時，她的父親Sir Nicholas Beke17歲，母親Joan Stafford14歲。她於1364年與Robert de Swynnerton在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯恩頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1373年在英國斯塔福爾斯恩頓享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Beke于大约1345年出生在英国林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比时，她的父亲Sir Nicholas Beke17岁，母亲Joan Stafford14岁。她于1364年与Robert de Swynnerton在英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯恩頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1373年在英国斯塔福爾斯恩頓享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: Beke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Flemish and Dutch: variant of   Beek  .
Hungarian (also Béke): most probably from a Hungarian form of the Turkish status name beg (see Beg ). Alternatively, it may be a pet form of a Hungarian personal name such as Benedek .

variants.name: Beek
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Johannes, Kurt, Otto.

Dutch and North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a stream or creek, beek (compare Bek 6), or a habitational name from any of various Dutch places called Beek (in Limburg, Gelderland, and North Brabant), named with the same word.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Beke was born about 1345, in Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Sir Nicholas Beke, was 17 and her mother, Joan Stafford, was 14. She married Robert de Swynnerton in 1364, in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1373, in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Beke est née environ 1345, à Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Nicholas Beke, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Joan Stafford, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Swynnerton en 1364, à Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1373, à Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Beke um 1345 in Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Nicholas Beke 17 und ihre Mutter Joan Stafford 14. Sie hat 1364 in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Robert de Swynnerton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1373 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Beke è nata il circa 1345 nel Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Sir Nicholas Beke, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Joan Stafford, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Swynnerton nel 1364, nel Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1373, nel Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Bekeが約1345年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas Bekeは17歳，母Joan Staffordは14歳であった。1364年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアスウイネルトンでRobert de Swynnertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1373年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアスウイネルトンで29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Beke(이)가 대략 1345년 영국 링코실르 스피스비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Nicholas Beke(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Stafford(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1364년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스윈르턴에서 Robert de Swynnerton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1373년 영국 스태퍼드실르 스윈르턴에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Beke nasceu aproximadamente 1345, em Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Nicholas Beke, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Joan Stafford, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Swynnerton em 1364, em Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1373, em Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Beke родилась около 1345 г. в местности спилсби, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Nicholas Beke было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Stafford, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Swynnerton в 1364 г. в местности свинниртон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1373 г. в местности свинниртон, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Beke nació aproximadamente 1345, en Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Nicholas Beke, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Joan Stafford, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Robert de Swynnerton en 1364, en Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1373, en Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 29 años.
